title: Inconsistent search with/without specialty accents and character marks

posts.author: belindaolsen (Belinda Olsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great if all the international accents could be searched using that key. When you search a word that has the letter 'a, ’ it would also pull in results that use à, á, â, ä, ǎ, ã, å, and ā without specifically requiring that accent is used. Monday’s results are currently inconsistent.

Some examples:

-ñ can be found when searching for ‘n’
-ü can be found when searching for ‘u’
-í can be found when searching for ‘i’

-è is *not *searchable when you use simply the letter ‘e’

What are you trying to achieve

Allow increased search capabilities across multiple languages. This would be used to search everything and within the board to find results with or without specialty characters. Not having this capability is resulting in duplicates within our workspace.
